content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (after iter-103)

## TOP PRIORITY ‚Äî environmental blocker (root cause this iter)
- **LSP is DEAD on `TensorObjInverse.lean`** (every `lean_goal`/`lean_diagnostic`/`lean_run_code` ‚Üí
  `[Errno 32] Broken pipe`; file imports the 12.8M-HB monster). This ‚Äî NOT math difficulty ‚Äî is why Seam3
  + the keystone chart-chase didn't land: each goal-inspection step costs a full ~1.5-min `trace_state`
  build. **Before the next prove lane on this file, try to restore interactive goal inspection** (e.g.
  `lean_build` to restart the LSP, or split the heavy target into a leaf importing only TensorObjSubstrate
  per the iter-095 K1 leaf-split pattern so the prover gets a live LSP). A blind build-driven session on a
  section-descent / chart-chase goal is the documented failure mode here.

## Closest-to-completion (prioritize, but only with goal inspection restored)
1. **`restrictIsoUnitOfLE_eq_restrict` (Seam-1 keystone)** ‚Äî typed, `apply Iso.ext` done, residual is the
   `.hom` chart-chase `restrictFunctorComp ‚Üî pullbackComp` reconciliation through the `pullbackCongr`/
   `restrictFunctorCongr` shim. Bridge `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general` is the lever (same RFIP
   bridge S2/S4c use). **Re-break FINE** along that shim if it resists (per no-grind guard); do NOT grind whole.
2. **Seam3 `trivialisation_restrict_sectionwise`** ‚Äî NOT created. Section-level `.val.app` descent over
   `U.Œπ ‚Åª¬π·µÅ V` with outer `eqToHom`s from `lem:image_preimage_of_le`. Conceptually hardest; needs live goals.
3. **Seam1 `trivialisation_restrict_eM_split`** ‚Äî NOT created. `tensorObjIsoOfIso` bifunctoriality split;
   consumes the keystone (#1) + S3/S4a. Blueprint block exists (`lem:trivialisation_restrict_em_split`).

## DO NOT
- **Do NOT re-prove `trivialisation_restrict_compat` as a monolith.** Its first real step is the Seam3
  section descent; send a prover only after Seam1+Seam3 are decomposed + ready AND the LSP is live.
- **Do NOT re-grind the keystone chart-chase blind.** If LSP cannot be restored, re-break it further first.

## Coverage debt (1-to-1 tex‚Üîlean) ‚Äî planner authors blueprint blocks
- **`restrictIsoUnitOfLE_eq_restrict`** (private, `TensorObjInverse.lean` ~L2599) ‚Äî NEW, no blueprint block
  (confirmed `dag-query unmatched`). Statement: `restrictIsoUnitOfLE hVU e = restrictCompReindex j hjŒπ M
  ‚â™‚â´ (restrictFunctor j).mapIso e ‚â™‚â´ unitRestrictIso j`. Intended `\uses`:
  `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general`, `def:restrictcompreindex`, `def:unitrestrictiso`,
  `restrictIsoUnitOfLE`. **Author it as a `\uses`-sub-lemma of `lem:trivialisation_restrict_em_split`**
  (its first bullet IS this `restrictIsoUnitOfLE = (restrict j) e` identity) ‚Äî see the `% NOTE:` placed
  there this iter. (`trivialisation_telescope_assemble` is already blueprinted ‚Äî not debt.)
- 158 pre-existing unmatched `lean_aux` nodes remain (081‚Äì101 dual-cone grind + Mathlib anchors), assigned
  to the post-FLANK "Coverage + cleanup" phase.

## Opportunistic comment cleanup (lean-auditor iter103 ‚Äî 4 MAJOR stale comments, comment-only)
Hand to whichever prover next owns the file; none block:
- L1146 ‚Äî cites a now-CLOSED `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` sorry.
- L2394 ‚Äî "BLOCKER" text contradicted by "EXECUTED (iter-066)" in the same block.
- L804 ‚Äî labels the proven `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` a "residual".
- L556 ‚Äî "ESCALATION" note for `hKEY` which is proven in-line.

## Blueprint cleanup (lean-vs-blueprint checker, minor)
- `lem:trivialisation_telescope_assemble` blueprint reindex-orientation is the MIRROR of the Lean
  convention (`œÅ_{k-1}.hom ‚â´ cV ‚â´ œÅ_k.inv` in Lean vs `œÅ_{k-1}^{-1} ; cV ; œÅ_k` in prose) ‚Äî writer realign.
- Seam1/Seam3 blueprint blocks have dangling `\lean{}` targets (decls not yet created) ‚Äî correctly
  unmarked; they resolve when the decls land. No action beyond writing the decls.

## Reusable patterns discovered
- **Generic `[Category C]` telescope cocycle collapse**: `subst <all squares>; simp only [Category.assoc,
  Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]`. Conjugation MUST be `œÅ_{k-1}.hom ‚â´ cV_k ‚â´ œÅ_k.inv` for `dU_k : O_{k-1} ‚ü∂ O_k`
  (the `œÅ.inv ‚â´ cV ‚â´ œÅ.hom` direction is a type error). Applied to concrete `SheafOfModules ‚â´` by `exact`,
  never `rw`/`ext` ‚Äî confines all seam-crossing.
